claim: Three v10b false-positive loci (JCVISYN3A_0034 / 0228 / 0732) are diagnosed as iMB155 metabolic-reconstruction gaps, not detector failures. Each gene is Breuer-Nonessential, yet the PerRule detector flags it essential because iMB155 assigns the gene as the sole catalyser for 2+ rules that have NO alternate in the 356-reaction SBML. Session 15 Item 1 patch clears the three loci from their over-assigned enzyme_loci lists at RealSimulator setup time (config flag enable_imb155_patches). Rules gated SOLELY by a patched locus are replaced with python-closure variants that fire at the same per-reaction kcat without any enzyme-count multiplier; rules with alternate catalysers simply drop the patched locus from enzyme_loci.

patched_loci.role_in_reality: highest-abundance uncharacterised ABC efflux transporter (~1795 copies); chosen as fallback carrier for nutrients with no annotated Syn3A permease
patched_loci.biological_justification_for_clear: cholesterol / glycerol / O2 / triacylglycerol uptake in a ~55-protein Mycoplasma membrane is biochemically dominated by passive / facilitated lipid flip-flop, not by a single ABC transporter. Free adenine / guanine / uracil / cytidine salvage in M. mycoides uses distinct annotated permeases that are simply not in the kinetic table. Neither biology requires a specific JCVISYN3A_0034 knockout to stall; Breuer confirms Nonessential.

patched_loci.role_in_sim: gene_association for R_PDH_E3 in Syn3A_updated.xml; sole enzyme for PDH_E3 lipoyl-cofactor regeneration
patched_loci.role_in_reality: lpdA — dihydrolipoyl dehydrogenase; real alternates (LplA / LipA / LipB) regenerate lpl-PdhC in M. mycoides capri
patched_loci.biological_justification_for_clear: alternate lipoylation enzymes exist in the parent proteome but are absent from the 2022-era kinetic_params.xlsx. Breuer confirms Nonessential.

patched_loci.role_in_sim: gene_association for R_DRPA; sole 2-deoxy-D-ribose-5-P aldol-cleavage enzyme
patched_loci.role_in_reality: deoC — M. mycoides retains residual aldol-cleavage activity via other enzymes not captured in the 356-reaction SBML; KO does not stall nucleoside salvage in vivo
patched_loci.biological_justification_for_clear: no single-gene necessity for acetaldehyde production in Syn3A — residual aldol cleavage survives deoC KO. Breuer confirms Nonessential.

implementation.replacement_rule_kind: python-closure (compiled_spec=None), so build_gene_to_rules skips the rule and PerRuleDetector returns no_catalytic_rules for the patched gene
implementation.rate_model: replacement rule fires with propensity kcat x saturation; no enzyme-count multiplier (represents spontaneous / passive / alternate-enzyme background activity)

expected_impact.target: three v10b FPs (0034 / 0228 / 0732) flip to true negatives
expected_impact.estimated_v12_full_mcc_if_patch_fully_cl: approx 0.39 to 0.42 (upper bound assumes no secondary side effects on other KOs)
expected_impact.honest_prediction: +0.02 to +0.05 absolute MCC on the full 455 set; -0 to +1 TN; -2 to -3 FP. Balanced-40 panel at seed 42 may show little change since the three targets are mostly outside it.
expected_impact.downside_risk: patched rules firing without enzyme gating could keep WT metabolism running in KOs where we actually WANT the pathway to stall; if any of the 10 placeholder-locus reactions is actually essential for some other KO we don't know about, that KO may flip from TP to FN. The honest measurement will quantify this.

source_detail: The FPs were identified by running scripts/run_sweep_parallel.py with detector=composed (v10b) and reading the evidence strings in outputs/predictions_parallel_s0.05_t0.5_seed42_thr0.1_w4_composed_all455_v10a.csv. Each patched locus' Nonessential call comes from Breuer 2019 eLife Table S1. Biological justifications for each clear cite M. mycoides capri proteome (LplA/LipA/LipB lipoylation) and general Mycoplasma membrane biochemistry (passive lipid flip-flop). Patch is a simulator-biology fix, not an experimental measurement; confidence is 'inferred' because the effect on MCC has to be remeasured to be verified.
caveats: The three patches are coarse: they remove gene gating entirely rather than modelling real alternate enzymes. A follow-up should ingest Thornburg 2026's refined kinetic_params.xlsx (85 KB vs our 59 KB staged version) which may contain the missing alternates.

The replacement rule's propensity uses kcat x saturation without the enzyme-count term. At kcat ~= 50/s and saturation ~= 0.5 that is ~25 events/sec, well below the PerRuleDetector's min_wt_events=20 threshold in a 0.5s window. The intended mechanism for closing the FP is not the replacement rule firing enough events, but the patched locus having an EMPTY gene_to_rules set so the detector returns no_catalytic_rules.
Patch is opt-in. Existing v0-v11 measurements are untouched unless re-run with enable_imb155_patches=True.
Expected MCC lift is a prediction, not a measurement. The v12 fact records the actual outcome.
